actions_taken: NO NEW TIGHTENING this tick. Rationale: the 13:30 assessment specified two explicit triggers for next-tick action (BFSI % of deployed re-inflecting UP; new BFSI entry attempted/admitted). Neither has fired. The single new OPEN order (NTPC, non-BFSI) is a diversifier, not a stacker. BFSI share of both filled and projected deployed is flat. Pulling a third lever while the strategy is visibly responding to the first two would be over-constraint.

Retained max_position_pct = 0.15 (set 12:30). AUBANK structural breach (18.46% on full fill from pre-cap OPEN orders) persists but is self-limiting — the cap blocks any further AUBANK add, and the two in-flight lots do not constitute a new violation. No new single-name stacking occurred this window.

Retained min_confidence = 0.60 (set 13:00). One new OPEN order landed in 60 min (vs three fills in the prior 30 min at 13:00-13:30), suggesting the confidence gate is reducing entry frequency alongside the diversification shift.

Did NOT add max_deployed_pct override (base 0.80). Projected deployment on full fill climbed to 68.89% (11 pp headroom remaining). At this velocity, 80% base cap could be approached within ~2 more ticks of similar activity — but it is inside the cap now, the cluster profile is diversifying rather than concentrating further, and a 0.70 override at 14:00 would risk clipping the NTPC or NESTLEIND second-lot fills if intraday prices drift. Preemptive and premature. Will reassess at 14:30 if deployment continues to climb.
Did NOT tighten daily_loss_limit_pct (0.03) or drawdown thresholds (10% / 15%). Realized P&L = ₹0 and no drawdown has materialized. Loss-gate tightening with zero losses is noise.

Did NOT tighten default_sl_pct (0.02), min_sl_pct (0.005), max_sl_pct (0.05), or min_risk_reward (1.5). No evidence that exit mechanics or R:R quality are the risk vector — the vector is concentration (targeted by max_position_pct) and qualification (targeted by min_confidence). Adding a restriction on an uncorrelated axis would not address the live risk.

Flagged for next tick (14:30): (a) if a 3rd power/PSU name is added, the emerging power cluster becomes a concentration vector and may warrant a cluster-aware response; (b) if projected deployment climbs past ~73-75%, add max_deployed_pct = 0.75 override as a hard ceiling ahead of the 80% base cap; (c) if BFSI % of deployed re-inflects UP (e.g. via a new BFSI OPEN order), tighten max_position_pct 0.15→0.12 per the 13:30 trigger plan; (d) if any existing OPEN order fills and unrealized-loss data becomes observable, re-check daily-loss exposure.
